d: One of the biggest misconceptions about Filipino food is that it's all unhealthy. It's all brown, fried, fatty and salty. You know, the party foods? But it's far from the truth. There are plenty of "Lutong-bahay" or homestyle Filipino dishes that are nutrient-dense like "LASWA". It's an Ilongo vegetable soup dish that consists of a variety of exotic vegetables like eggplant, long beans or sitaw, kobucha squash or kalabasa, sponge gourd or patola, spinach, etc. Shrimp for protein is added and just salt for seasoning. Simple yet comforting and grabe, ang sarap! #filipino #filipinofood #filipinorecipe #foodtok #vegetables
zh: 关于菲律宾食物，最大的误解之一是它全都不健康——颜色深、油炸、多脂、偏咸，就像派对食品那样。但事实远非如此。有很多"Lutong-bahay"（家常菜）营养丰富，比如"LASWA"。这是一道伊隆戈风味蔬菜汤，食材包括茄子、长豆、南瓜、丝瓜、菠菜等多种蔬菜，加入虾仁补充蛋白质，仅用盐调味。简单却暖心，真的非常好吃！

d: This might be the only soup I will never get tired of eating 🥰 Beef Sinigang is so comforting and delicious!  Ingredients 2 packets @knorr tamarind soup mix 1 lb beef brisket 3 beef spare ribs Fish sauce to taste 3 tomatoes 1 large onion 2 taro root Handful of okra 1 eggplant 6 bundles bok choy Handful of green beans 3 Thai chili Salt & pepper to taste Instructions Season the brisket with salt, pepper, and fish sauce. Sear with 1 tomato, 1/2 onion, and taro until browned. Cover with water and pressure cook for 45 minutes. Add remaining veggies + tamarind soup mix. Boil until veggies are tender (not mushy). Serve with rice and enjoy. #sinigang #beefsinigang #soursoup #filipinofood #pinoyfood
zh: 这可能是我唯一一道永远吃不腻的汤——牛肉酸汤（Beef Sinigang）太治愈、太美味了！食材：罗坤牌罗望子汤料2包、牛腩450克、牛排骨3根、鱼露适量、番茄3个、大洋葱1个、芋头2个、秋葵一把、茄子1根、小白菜6把、四季豆一把、泰国辣椒3根、盐和胡椒适量。做法：牛腩用盐、胡椒和鱼露腌制，与1个番茄、半个洋葱和芋头一起煎至上色，加水压力锅煮45分钟，再加入其余蔬菜和罗望子汤料，煮至蔬菜熟透但不软烂，配米饭享用。

d: How to cook BISTEK TAGALOG. It's a staple dish in many Filipino households because it's delicious and easy to make. Thinly sliced beef braised in soy sauce, calamansi juice (lime or lemon), garlic and pepper with lots and lots of onions. A little salty, savory and tangy. So good! Enjoy with steamed white rice, duh!  RECIPE will be up in less than 2 weeks at www.TitaBecky.com New website is under construction. #foodtok #Filipino #filipinofood ##filipinorecipe
zh: 教你做菲律宾家常菜塔加洛牛肉（BISTEK TAGALOG）。这道菜在菲律宾家庭中极为普遍，做法简单又美味——薄切牛肉用酱油、卡拉曼西柠檬汁、大蒜和胡椒焖煮，配上大量洋葱，口味微咸、鲜香略酸，非常好吃！配白米饭食用。食谱将在两周内发布于 www.TitaBecky.com，新网站正在建设中。

d: 🇵🇭 Arroz a la Cubana | Filipino Food Bible Episode 5 Arroz a la Cubana originated in Spain, making its way to the Philippines during the colonial period. Though it is a popular humble dish in its country of origins, there are elements that are distinctly Filipino in our version that set it apart. Namely, the use of saba, ground meat and other seasonings! 😍 INGREDIENTS: Arroz a la Cubana: - 1 whole white onion, diced - 10-15 cloves of garlic, sliced - 1 large tomato, diced - 2-3 tsp of tomato paste - 2kg of ground beef - 1/3 cup of soy sauce - 2 tbsp of Worcestershire sauce - 1 large potato, diced - 1 large carrot, diced - 1-2 bell peppers, diced - 1/2 cup of green peas - 1/2 cup of raisins - 1 tbsp of Spanish paprika - Salt and pepper to taste Others: - saba banana, sliced in half and fried - 2 eggs, sunny side up INSTRUCTIONS:  - To start sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes until soft before adding tomato paste and mixing them together.  - Then add your ground meat, adding Worcestershire and soy sauce. Add vegetables like carrots, potatoes, bell peppers, and green peas along with raisins for added sweetness.  - Mix together, and season with paprika, salt, and pepper.  - Serve with saba, a heaping serving of your arroz a la Cubana, fried eggs and enjoy! #cookingasmr #asmr #filipinofood #pinoyfood

d: Espasol is one of those snacks that always reminds you of your childhood. ❤️  Soft, chewy, and coated in toasted rice flour, it has that lightly nutty flavor that keeps you reaching for another piece. It's the kind of kakanin that feels comforting the moment you take a bite. Catch more food stories from our Laguna series on YouTube. 🔥  ESPASOL Ingredients: 16 oz glutinous rice flour 2 cans coconut milk 1 can evaporated milk 1 can condensed milk pinch salt macapuno Procedure: 1. Toast the glutinous rice flour in a large pan or wok on medium-high heat and stir frequently so it doesn’t burn. Once it turns a light shade of brown and becomes aromatic, remove from heat. Set aside about ½ cup toasted flour to coat the bottom of your pan. 2. In a large bowl, add all ingredients, including the rest of the toasted flour and stir until incorporated. Transfer back to the pan and bring to a boil.  3. Lower heat to medium-low and stir until the mixture forms into a ball.  4. Once the mixture is smooth and shiny, remove from heat and transfer to the prepared pan. Spread evenly. 5. Sprinkle the rest of the toasted flour and make sure to coat the full surface. Slice and serve! #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #laguna #espasol

Want Pinoy food that lasts in your fridge that's NOT adobo? Try this recipe. 🔥  This version of estofado traces back to a 1935 cookbook, and the cooking process tells a story. In a time before refrigeration, it was made to last, feeding families for days. Every bite offers a glimpse into how people once cooked with care, preserving both flavor and longevity through thoughtful techniques and ingredients. 👩🏻‍🍳  ESTOFADONG FILIPINO From the book: 1935 Libro nin Pagluto asin Pagconserva Ingredients: 1 kilo of meat (usually beef or pork) 1 cup vinegar 2 onions 5 saba bananas (ripe plantains) 2 glasses of water 1 cup sugar 1 head of garlic 1 small glass (copita) of gin (Ginebra) Procedure: 1. Fry the meat until browned. Set aside the fried meat, this will be used for the stew. 2. In a separate pot or pan, caramelize the sugar by heating it with a bit of vinegar. 3. Once the sugar has melted and slightly caramelized, add the remaining vinegar and water. Stir and cook until the mixture resembles a broth. 4. While it's simmering, prepare a pot (koron) by lining the bottom with banana leaves or any barrier to prevent the meat from sticking or burning. 5. Place the fried meat into the pot, along with all the ingredients: chopped onions, garlic, sliced saba bananas, and the prepared broth. Also, add the gin at this stage. 6. Cover the meat with banana leaves to seal in moisture and flavor. 7. Cook over low heat, and once it starts boiling, reduce the fire further and let it slowly cook until the meat is tender. 8. Once done, this dish can be preserved for up to a month, and reheated only when ready to serve. #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #estofado

🇵🇭 Suam na Mais (Filipino Corn Soup) | Soups So Good It Can Cure Any Sickness Ep. 28 Suam na mais is a  Filipino corn soup with roots in Pampanga - a province in the 🇵🇭. It’s usually made w/ white corn (malagkit na mais). My grandmother used to make this when I was younger so this holds a special place in my ❤️ It’s honestly one of the tastiest and most comforting soups I’ve ever had and it’s kinda reminiscent of a thin porridge as well 😋 INGREDIENTS:  Shrimp/Chicken Stock: - 1 kg of shrimp shells - Chicken stock as needed Suam na Mais  - 1 kg of prawn/shrimp - 8 pcs white corn, chopped and half grated - 10-15 cloves of garlic, chopped  - 1 white onion, chopped - ½ kilo chicken cuts - Shrimp/Chicken broth as needed - 1 tbsp of patis - 3-5 pcs long green chilies - ½ cup of malunggay leaves - salt and pepper to taste *measurements are just estimates. Taste and adjust w your ❤️ INSTRUCTIONS:  - remove and chop corn kernels. grate half including the cob. The natural starch will help thicken the broth. - Make a simple shrimp-chicken stock by simmering shrimp shells. Sear the shrimp meat separately. - sauté garlic and onions. Add the chicken pieces, then pour in the prepared stock. Season with fish sauce and add the reserved corn cobs. simmer for 20–30 minutes, then remove the cobs. - Add the shrimp, along with the grated and chopped corn and allow to thicken. add chilies and malunggay off heat - Serve hot and enjoy! #CookingASMR #ASMR #Soups #filipinofood #pinoyfood

Ilocos Empanada… but make it lumpia Filling: 1 cup mung beans, rinsed 1 small green papaya, peeled & grated (about 2 cups) 4–6 Ilocos longganisa, casings removed 3–4 hard-boiled eggs, sliced into thin strips 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp black pepper ½–1 tsp salt (to taste) 1 tsp chicken powder 16 lumpia wrappers Slurry: 1 Tbsp cornstarch + 2 Tbsp water Instructions: 1️⃣ Simmer mung beans in lightly salted water 20–25 minutes until tender but not mushy. Drain well and cool completely. 2️⃣ Lightly salt grated papaya and let sit 20 minutes. Squeeze out as much liquid as possible. 3️⃣ Mix papaya with mung beans, garlic powder, black pepper, chicken powder, and salt. Adjust to taste. 4️⃣ Cook longganisa until caramelized and fully cooked. Slice into thin strips. 5️⃣ To assemble: Place 2 Tbsp filling on wrapper, add longganisa and egg strips. Roll tightly, fold sides in, and seal with slurry. Don’t overfill. 6️⃣ Fry at 350°F for 3–4 minutes per side until deep golden and crispy. Drain on a rack. Rest a few minutes before biting in. Serve with spiced vinegar. #ilocosempanada #empanada #lumpia #recipe #filipino

Filipino Pork Adobo 🤎 Ingredients: * 2 lbs pork shoulder, cut into cubes * 2 tbsp oil * 1 large onion, sliced * 8 cloves garlic, sliced * 3 cups water * 1/2 cup soy sauce * 1 1/2 tsp dark soy sauce * 1/4 cup rice vinegar * 3 tbsp brown sugar * 1 1/2 tsp black peppercorns * 5 bay leaves * Pineapple chunks * Green onion + rice for serving Instructions: 1. Heat oil and sear pork until browned on all sides. Remove and set aside. 2. In the same pot, sauté onion for 2 minutes, then add garlic and cook until fragrant. 3. Add water, soy sauces, vinegar, brown sugar, peppercorns, and bay leaves. Stir well. 4. Return pork to the pot with all the juices. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer partially covered for 1 1/2 hours until the pork is fall-apart tender. 5. While simmering, caramelize pineapple chunks in a pan until golden on both sides. 6. Remove pork from the pot and boil the sauce over high heat for 7–10 minutes until slightly reduced. 7. Add pork and pineapple back into the sauce and toss gently to coat. 8. Serve over jasmine rice and top with green onions. Sweet, savory, tangy, and so comforting 🤍  #food #foodie #homecook #recipesoftiktok
zh: 菲律宾猪肉阿斗波——食材：猪肩肉900克切块、油2汤匙、洋葱1个切片、蒜8瓣切片、水3杯、生抽半杯、老抽1.5茶匙、米醋1/4杯、红糖3汤匙、黑胡椒粒1.5茶匙、月桂叶5片、菠萝块、葱花和米饭配餐。做法：1.热油将猪肉各面煎至上色，盛出备用。2.同锅炒洋葱2分钟，加蒜炒香。3.加水、酱油、醋、红糖、胡椒粒、月桂叶搅匀。4.将猪肉连汁倒回锅中，煮沸后转小火半盖锅盖焖1.5小时至肉质软烂。5.焖煮期间将菠萝块煎至两面金黄。6.取出猪肉，大火将汤汁收浓7至10分钟。7.将猪肉和菠萝放回拌匀。8.盛于茉莉香米饭上，撒葱花。甜咸酸香，极为治愈。

d: Cowboy butter steak bites ✨ My husband ate both of these plates and rated it a 10/10 😭 Ingredients  Steak - 2 pounds ribeye or sirloin steak, cubed - 1 tbsp neutral oil - 2 tsp Worcestershire sauce  - 2 tsp garlic powder  - Salt and pepper to taste (generous amount) “Caramelized” onions  - 1 large yellow onion, sliced - 1 tsp granulated sugar  - Heaping pinch of salt Cowboy butter - 12 tbsp unsalted butter - 5 garlic cloves, minced  - 1 shallot, minced  - 1 lemon, freshly squeezed - 1 tbsp Dijon mustard  - 1 heaping tbsp parsley, chopped - 1 heaping tbsp chives, chopped - 1 tsp thyme - 1 tsp cayenne powder (adjust to heat preference  - 1/2 tsp red chili flakes - 1/2 tsp smoked paprika  - Salt to taste  Instructions  - Toss cubed steak with oil, Worcestershire, garlic powder, and a generous amount of salt & pepper. Set aside while the pan heats. - Heat a skillet over medium heat with a little oil or butter. - Add onions, sugar, and salt. Cook 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft, golden, and jammy. Remove from pan and set aside. - Crank heat to medium-high/high. Add steak in a single layer (work in batches if needed). - Sear 2–3 minutes per side until deeply browned. Remove and set aside. Lower heat to medium. - Add butter to the same pan. Once melted, add garlic and shallot — cook ~30 seconds until fragrant. - Stir in lemon juice, Dijon, parsley, chives, thyme, cayenne, chili flakes, smoked paprika, and salt. - Add steak back to the pan. - Toss to coat in the butter sauce for 1–2 minutes. - Serve over creamy mashed potatoes and enjoy! • • • #recipe #steak #dinnerideas #food #steak

d: WELCOME TO EGGS FROM AROUND THE WORLD 🍳🌍 welcome to eggs from around the world. my brand new mini series where I’ll be showing you how to make the best egg dishes the world has to offer.. this is episode 6 where will be taking a trip to Spain, to make some Huevos a la flamenca 🇪🇸! Full recipe below 250ml extra virgin olive oil 1 medium potato cubed 1 Spanish brown onion diced 3 garlic cloves diced 1 chorizo sausage diced 2 rashers of Jamon Serrano sliced 100g frozen garden peas 200ml passata 1 tbsp salt 1 tbsp black pepper Free range eggs Handful chopped parsley Step (1) In a large skillet heat up the olive oil. Once hot, add the potatoes and cook for 10 minutes until golden brown. Add the onion and garlic, reduce the heat and cook for a further 5 minutes. Drain the oil from the pot. Step (2) In the same pan, add chorizo and Jamon and lightly cook for a few minutes until the chorizo releases some of its fat. Then add the potatoes, onions and garlic back into the pan. Add the passata, salt and pepper, cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Taste and adjust for seasoning levels, then place in either small oven proof pots (in video) or in a large baking dish. Gently crack as many eggs as you want ontop of the sauce, then place in a preheated oven at 180C for 2/3 minutes until the egg white has set. Serve with some bread and enjoy :) #egg #eggrecipe #huevos #spanishfood #spain #series #fyp

d: CRAB RANGOON NACHOS  Recipe by: @Irene Choi  8 oz cream cheese, softened 8 oz imitation crab, shredded and chopped 1 tsp soy sauce 1 tsp sugar 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp white pepper 1 tsp worceshire sauce 1-2 chopped scallion 4 minced garlic Wonton wrappers   ADDITIONAL INGREDIENTS Gochujang crema: 1 part gochujang + 3 or 4 part Mexican crema Sweet chili sauce Chili oil Furikake Jalapenos or serrano Scallion     1. Combine cream cheese, imitation crab, soy sauce, sugar, garlic powder, white pepper, worceshire sauce, chopped scallion and minced garlic. 2. Assemble your nachos with wonton wrappers and crab Rangoon filling (Watch video for clarification). Apply water to the edge and press to seal shut. 3. Then fry until golden brown. 4. For the topping, make gochujang crema. 5. Assemble: nachos, gochujang crema, sweet chili sauce, chili oil, furikake, chopped jalapenos, and scallion for garnish.     Gochujang crema: 1 part gochujang + 3 or 4 part Mexican crema Sweet chili sauce Chili oil Furikake Jalapenos or serrano Scallion

d: BRAISED SALMON STEAKS Recipe by: @Tracey Le | JustlikeMoms  2 salmon steaks 2 TBSP minced garlic 2 shallots, minced 4 TBSP sugar of choice (monkfruit sweetener, coconut sugar, sugar) 3 TBSP avocado oil 2 TBSP chicken bouillon/ chicken powder 2 tsp black pepper ½ tsp salt 1 cup water 1 TBSP fish sauce 2 TBSP dark soy sauce   1. Make your marinade with minced garlic, minced shallots, monkfruit sweetener, avocado oil, chicken bouillon, black pepper and salt. marinate this with your salmon steaks for 30 minutes.  2. After 30 mins, transfer steaks to a clay pot, sauce pan or chefs pan. Cook for 1 or 2 minutes on each side. 3. Then add 1 cup of water. Bring this to a boil and then reduce heat to medium and simmer for 15-20 minutes. Make sure to spoon the sauce over your salmon steaks from time to time. note: during this time your sauce will thicken. If it starts to thicken too much/ almost about to burn, add some additional water.  4. Garnish with chopped scallion and enjoy 5. I served mine with rice/ cauliflower rice, steamed okra and thai egg plant.

d: Sheet Pan Chicken Taco Lettuce Boats I forget how ridiculously good this recipe is every single time I make it. Crispy taco chicken, chili-lime street corn, all the cold toppings, and somehow you still feel like a functioning adult afterward instead of needing a nap. And yes, I used queso fresco. Mind your business.                    Ingredients For the chicken: * 2½ lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs, chopped small * 2 packets taco seasoning * 1 teaspoon garlic powder * 1 teaspoon smoked paprika * Juice of 1 lime For the chili-lime corn: * 4 fresh ears of corn, kernels shaved off * ½ purple onion, diced * 1 tablespoon olive oil * 1 teaspoon chili powder * Salt to taste * Juice of ½–1 lime * ½ cup queso fresco * Fresh cilantro, chopped For serving: * Green leaf lettuce (sandwich cut) * Diced avocado * Pico de gallo * Jalapeño slices * Crema or Greek yogurt * Extra cilantro Instructions 1. Preheat oven to 425°F and line a sheet pan with parchment paper. 2. Toss chopped chicken with taco seasoning, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and lime juice. 3. Spread chicken onto one side of the sheet pan in an even layer. No oil needed. 4. Bake for 10 minutes. 5. Toss corn and purple onion with olive oil, chili powder, and salt. 6. Remove the pan, push chicken to one side, and add the corn mixture to the empty side. 7. Return to oven for another 10 minutes, then broil the last 3 minutes for crispy edges and charred corn. 8. Remove from oven and squeeze lime juice over the corn. Top with queso fresco and cilantro. 9. Assemble lettuce boats with chicken, street corn, avocado, pico, jalapeños, crema, and extra cilantro #taco #dinner #recipe #sheetpandinner #chicken

d: Hot Honey Chicken Pasta 🍯🔥 the viral recipe with over 60+ million views, 20/10 hits every time! Recipe: Chicken Tenders • 1 lb chicken tenderloins • 1 tsp onion powder • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp seasoned salt • 1 tsp creole seasoning • 1 tsp cayenne pepper (optional, adjust to spice) • 1 tsp all purpose seasoning • 1 sazon packet • 1–2 cups buttermilk • ⅛ cup jalapeño or pickle juice • 3 cups all-purpose flour (season with same seasonings) Hot Honey Sauce • ½ cup buffalo sauce • ¼ cup honey • ⅛ cup hot sauce (optional) Pasta • 1 lb penne pasta • 2 tbsp unsalted butter • 2 garlic cloves, finely minced • ½ yellow onion, finely chopped • 1 ½ cups heavy cream • 1 tsp onion powder • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp seasoned salt • 1 tsp creole seasoning • 1 tsp cayenne pepper (optional) • 1 tsp all purpose seasoning • 1 tsp black pepper • Grated mozzarella • Grated Parmesan Instructions 1. Season chicken tenderloins add in buttermilk and jalapeño/pickle juice then marinate for at least 30 minutes to an hour.  2. Coat chicken in seasoned flour set aside on wire rack and rest for 10 minutes before frying. Fry at 350°F until golden brown and crispy. Set aside and let cool on a wire rack. 3. In a sauce pan, add 1 tbsp of unsalted butter, buffalo sauce, honey, and hot sauce and simmer until fully combined. Then toss chicken in the hot honey sauce. 4. In a skillet, melt butter and sauté garlic and onion until fragrant. Pour in heavy cream and stir in all seasonings. 5. Add mozzarella and Parmesan until melted and creamy, then toss in cooked pasta. 6. Top creamy pasta with hot honey chicken and extra sauce if desired and enjoy :) #hothoneychickenpasta #hothoney #chickenpasta #pasta #fypシ

Recipe⤵️ Would you eat this? Honey Sesame Chicken Ingredients: For the Chicken: 1 chicken breast, cubed ½ tsp salt ½ tsp black pepper ½ tsp nutritional yeast ½ tsp baking powder 1 egg 2 tbsp cold water 1 tbsp avocado oil 2 tbsp cornstarch 2 tbsp flour (I used gluten-free) For the Sauce: ½ tbsp avocado oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp honey 2 tbsp soy sauce 1 tbsp ketchup ½ tbsp rice vinegar ½ tbsp toasted sesame oil 1 tbsp sesame seeds ¼ cup water + 1 cornstarch, mixed Green onions, chopped, for topping Directions: For the Chicken: In a bowl, combine the chicken, salt, black pepper, nutritional yeast, and baking powder In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, water, avocado oil, cornstarch, and flour Pour the egg mixture over the chicken and let sit for 10-15 minutes Heat 2-3 inches of oil to 350 F, then fry the chicken pieces until at least 165 F at the thickest part Remove the chicken from the oil, then place on a paper towel to absorb excess oil For the Sauce: In a bowl, combine the honey, soy sauce, ketchup, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sesame seeds In a wok or high-sided pan on medium-low heat, warm the oil, then cook the garlic until fragrant, around 1-2 minutes Add in the sauce mixture and the cornstarch and water mixture, then mix until thickened Remove from the heat and add in the chicken pieces; mix and serve topped with green onions Enjoy!! #sesamechicken #chinesefood #trendingfoods #viralrecipes

d: 5-minute bulgogi that doesn’t need to be pre-marinated! if you’re new here, welcome back to lazy girl dinners where i make easy asian-inspired meals the whole family loves. lazy girl dinners, ep 4: 5-minute bulgogi 🥩 what you need: 1.5-2 lbs thinly sliced beef brisket (or ground beef!) 1 onion, sliced ⅓ cup soy sauce 2 tbsp mirin 2 tbsp sugar (i used applesauce!) 1 tbsp sesame oil 1 tsp dashi powder how to make it: slice onion and sauté until fragrant add in thinly sliced beef mix sauce ingredients together and pour over beef close lid and let cook for 3 minutes or until fully cooked through garnish with sesame seeds and green onions serve over rice #lazygirldinners #familymeals #easymeal #easyrecipe #quickrecipes

d: Settle down now, school is in session😏 Welcome back to “Single, but cooking like someone’s falling for me tonight.” Who’s hungry?👀 GIANT GARLIC BREAD GRILLED HOT DOGS 🌭🧄🧀 For the hot dog rolls: • 500 g strong white bread flour • 10 g salt • 10 g caster sugar • 7 g fast-action dried yeast • 300 ml whole milk, lukewarm • 1 egg • 40 g unsalted butter, softened For the garlic butter: • 100 g unsalted butter, softened • 4 garlic cloves, finely minced • Small handful fresh parsley, finely chopped • ½ tsp salt • Pinch chilli flakes (optional) • 6 large frankfurters Method: 1. Mix the flour, salt, sugar and yeast in a bowl. Add the milk and egg and mix into a dough. 2. Knead until smooth, then knead in the butter. 3. Cover and leave to rise until doubled. 4. Divide into 6, roll into long sausage shapes and flatten slightly. 5. Leave to rise again until puffy. 6. Bake at 180°C fan for 15–18 minutes until lightly golden. 7. Mix together all the garlic butter ingredients. 8. Lightly score the frankfurters and cook on a griddle pan until coloured. 9. Slice the buns open, spread with garlic butter and toast cut-side down until golden. 10. Add cheese and cooked bacon bits, close the buns and heat gently with a lid on until melted. 11. Add the hot dogs and top with caramelised onions, crispy onions, ketchup and mustard. 12. Serve immediately #garlicbutter

d: Crispy Potato Sticks  Crispy outside, soft inside and so addictive. Recipe: • 500 g potatoes • 3 tbsp cornstarch • 1 tsp garlic powder • Fresh parsley • Salt & black pepper Boil and mash the potatoes. Mix with cornstarch, parsley and seasonings. Spread into a thin layer and freeze for 1 hour. Cut into sticks and fry in hot oil until golden and crispy. d: Mozzarella Snuggets 🇮🇹 Inspired by @Ryan Michael Carter, these are way too easy for how delicious they are. Recipe below ⬇️  • Ingredients: 2 pizza doughs (or 1 large) 6-7 mozzarella cheese sticks Lightly dried basil Italian seasoning Garlic butter (1 stick butter, 2 tsp garlic, 1 tsp basil) Basil and parm as garnish Frying oil • Instructions: -Stretch out dough into a rectangle-ish shape. Be sure to dust it well with flour and cornmeal to prevent it from sticking to the surface -Cut cheese sticks into 1” pieces and place onto the dough with enough room to fold dough over the cheese. Season with a little basil and Italian seasoning, then close in, pinching the ends of the dough together -Cut into individual pieces and be sure all ends are closed off so that no cheese escapes in the oil -Place in oil at 350-375°F and fry for just a few minutes (stirring until golden brown) and place on a warming rack -Cover in garlic butter and parm, then toss well. Serve with a little more basil and parm for some of the most flavorful bites you’ll ever have 😮‍💨 • Let me know if you have any questions 🫶

d: Crispy Chicken Shawarma Wraps 🔥 For all of you asking about my recipe organizing app, search “Osta” on the app or google play store 🫶 Juicy chicken shawarma, creamy garlic sauce and crispy fries wrapped into one perfect bite 🌯 For the Chicken: -1.5 lbs (680g) skinless chicken thighs, sliced into strips -Seasoning: 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tbsp onion powder, 2 tsp coriander, 1 tsp allspice, 2 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp salt -3 tbsp olive oil -8 garlic cloves, minced -2 tbsp tomato paste -1/3 cup Greek yogurt -½ lemon, juiced For the Onions: -1 red onion, thinly sliced -2 tbsp olive oil -½ lemon, juiced -1/4 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped -1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper, 2 tsp sumac For the Garlic Sauce: -1/2 cup Greek yogurt -1/2 cup mayonnaise -3 garlic cloves, minced -1/4 lemon, juiced For the Red Sauce Glaze: -1/4 cup olive oil + 2 tbsp tomato paste -1 tbsp pomegranate molasses (optional) -1 tsp paprika For Assembly: -3 Roma tomatoes, diced -Pitas -Frozen french fries Instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine the sliced chicken, spices, olive oil, garlic, tomato paste, yogurt, and lemon juice. Mix well & marinate for as long as your patience can handle, up to overnight. 2. In a large pan over medium-high heat, add a layer of olive oil. Once hot, add the chicken. Cook undisturbed for 3 mins, then cook for 6–7 more mins, stirring often, until golden & cooked through. 3. In a bowl, combine the sliced red onion, olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, salt, pepper, and sumac. Toss well, set aside. 4. In a bowl, mix the Greek yogurt, mayo, garlic, and lemon juice. Set aside in fridge. 5. In a bowl, whisk olive oil, tomato paste, pomegranate molasses (if using), & paprika. 6. Prepare your French fries however you like. Assemble the wraps: spread a generous layer of garlic sauce onto each pita. Top with  chicken, French fries, diced tomatoes & the onions. Wrap tightly. 7. Melt butter in a pan over low heat. Place the wraps seam-side down & brush the tops with the red sauce. Cook until crispy golden, flip, brush the other side, & repeat. Top with more garlic sauce. Enjoy!! #recipesoftiktok #dinnerideas #shawarma #viral #chicken

d: Made with Marcangelo Mild Italian Sausage from @foodlion, this one comes together so easily but tastes like something you'd order at a restaurant. The sausage brings so much flavor, and the creamy garlic parmesan sauce ties everything together perfectly. Quick recipe: Cook Marcangelo sausage until browned, then remove. In the same pan, sauté butter, shallots, and garlic. Season with dried oregano, garlic salt, and Kinder's Butter seasoning. Add heavy cream and a splash of pasta water and let it simmer until slightly thickened. Toss in cooked rigatoni, add the sausage back in, and mix until coated. Finish with Parmesan cheese and red pepper flakes. Save this for your next cozy dinner night and grab your ingredients on your next Food Lion run. #pasta #pastarecipe #dinnerideas #easyrecipes #sponsored

d: Our athletes said these were the best baked potatoes they’ve ever had… thank you @Nick Nesgoda for the idea!  These are amazing!! Steakhouse Loaded Potato Bombs Ingredients * 5 large russet potatoes * Olive oil * Neutral oil, for frying * 1/3 cup butter @tillamook  * 3 cups shredded cheddar cheese  * 1/2 cup whole milk * 1/2 cup crème fraiche @vermontcreamery  * 1/3 cup chopped chives * 2 tsp kosher salt * 1 tsp black pepper * 1 tsp garlic powder * 1 tsp onion powder * 2 ribeye steaks @butcher_box  * Kosher salt and black pepper, for the steak Instructions 1. Coat the potatoes in olive oil and bake at 425°F for about 1 hour, or until fork tender. 2. Cut the potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop the insides into a large bowl, leaving enough potato around the edges so the skins hold their shape. 3. Heat neutral oil to 350°F and fry the potato skins until golden brown and crispy. Set aside on paper towels. 4. Add the butter, 2 cups of cheddar cheese, milk, sour cream, chives, kosher salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder to the bowl with the potato insides. Mix thoroughly until creamy and combined. 5. Stuff each potato skin generously with the filling, slightly overfilling them for that loaded look. Sprinkle remaining cup of cheddar over all of them. 6. Season the ribeye or skirt steak heavily with kosher salt and black pepper. Grill or cook on a ripping hot griddle over high heat, flipping every 2–3 minutes for an even crust.  * Ribeye (medium-rare): about 4–5 minutes per side  * Ribeye (medium): about 5–7 minutes per side  * Skirt steak: about 3–4 minutes per side over very high heat 7. Let the steak rest for 10 minutes, then slice against the grain into bite-sized pieces. 8. Place the stuffed potato skins back into a 350°F oven for about 5 minutes until hot and melty. Then broil for a few more to get the tops golden 9. Top with sliced steak and extra chives, then serve immediately. Sauce: Sour cream, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt, pep… little bit of each to taste! #steak #athlete #bakedpotato #steakandpotatoes  @Sur La Table @webergrill_official @HexClad

d: Culver’s is a popular fast-casual restaurant known for its high-quality food and friendly service. One of the things that makes Culver’s stand out is its commitment to freshness. Their famous ButterBurgers are made with fresh, never-frozen beef that is cooked to order, which gives them a juicy flavor that many people love. Culver’s is also well known for its creamy frozen custard, which is richer and smoother than regular ice cream and comes in a rotating “Flavor of the Day.” Along with burgers and custard, the menu includes items like crispy chicken sandwiches, cheese curds, and homestyle sides. Because of the quality of the food and the welcoming atmosphere in their restaurants, many customers consider Culver’s one of the best fast-food experiences available. #culvers #fyp #fypシ #ceo
zh: Culver's 是一家以高品质食物和热情服务著称的休闲快餐连锁店，以新鲜现做的黄油汉堡和浓郁顺滑的冻卡仕达冰淇淋闻名，菜单还包括脆皮鸡肉三明治、芝士凝块和家常配菜。

d: 🚨 STOP SCROLLING, because you just found your new hyper-fixation dinner! 🤤🔥 If you’re looking for a sign to treat yourself, this is it. We are making the ultimate Creamy Garlic Pasta topped with a perfectly juicy, medium-rare Ribeye Steak. It is rich, velvety, packed with flavor, and surprisingly easy to make. Drop a comment if you want a bite! 👇✨ THE RECIPE: 🥩 For the Ribeye Steak: 1 ribeye steak Steak seasoning (for both sides) Salt & black pepper (to taste) Avocado oil (for searing) 20g butter 2 cloves garlic 🍝 For the Creamy Garlic Pasta: 300–400g pasta 1 small onion (finely diced) 5 cloves garlic (crushed) 1 tsp red chili flakes Tomato puree (paste) Splash of boiling water 2 tsp paprika 400ml double cream / heavy whipping cream 1 tsp oregano / Italian herbs Cheddar cheese (grated) Parsley (for garnish) 👩‍🍳 Instructions: Prep the Steak: Pat the ribeye dry with a paper towel. Season both sides heavily with salt, black pepper, and your favorite steak seasoning. Let it come to room temperature while making the pasta. Sauté the Aromatics: Melt some butter in a pan over medium heat. Add the diced onion with a pinch of salt and cook until soft. Stir in the crushed garlic and cook for 2–3 minutes. Build the Sauce Base: Add the tomato puree and a splash of boiling water, cooking for about a minute. Stir in the paprika and let the spices cook out slightly. Make it Creamy: Pour in the double cream and bring to a boil over high heat until bubbling. Lower the heat, then stir in the oregano, grated cheddar cheese, and red chili flakes. Simmer until thick and glossy. Combine: Toss in some pasta water to loosen the sauce, then add your boiled pasta. Mix well so the pasta soaks up the sauce, and finish with a sprinkle of parsley. Turn off the heat. Sear the Steak: Pre-heat a grill pan to its highest setting and add avocado oil. Sear the steak for 2 minutes on each side, applying pressure. Toss in the butter and garlic cloves, then baste the steak continuously. Rest & Serve: Let the steak rest for 5 minutes to keep it perfectly juicy, then slice it up. Place it right on top of your creamy pasta and enjoy! #pastasteak #creampasta #ribeyesteak #easyrecipe #DinnerIdeas

d: Crispy chicken parmesan pasta •1lb chicken breast •2 eggs •1/2 cup flour - season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder and paprika.  •1 cup panko bread crumbs + 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese •neutral cooking oil  •8oz mafaldine pasta Sauce: •3 tbsp butter •1/2 onion •4-6 cloves of garlic  •1 1/2 cup heavy cream •1 cup parmesan cheese •1/2 tsp basil •1/2 tsp chipotle powder •1/2 tsp black pepper  •1/4 tsp salt •1 tsp paprika  •1 tsp garlic powder •1 tsp onion powder •1 tsp chicken bullion  •1 tbsp fresh parsley  •1/4 cup pasta water  Cook the mafaldine pasta in a large pot of salted water according to the package directions. Reserve 1/4 cup of pasta water before draining, then set the pasta aside. While the pasta cooks, heat a neutral oil in a deep skillet or pot to 350°F. Prepare a breading station using three shallow plates: add the flour along with salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika to the first plate, whisk the eggs in the second, and combine the panko breadcrumbs with Parmesan cheese in the third. Coat each chicken breast first in the seasoned flour, then in the egg, and finally in the breadcrumb mixture, pressing lightly so the coating adheres well. Fry the chicken until golden brown and cooked through, reaching an internal temperature of 165°F. If the outside browns too quickly, transfer the chicken to a wire rack and finish baking at 350°F until fully cooked. For the sauce, melt the butter in a large pan over medium-low heat and sauté the onion until soft and translucent. Stir in the garlic and half of the seasonings, allowing them to bloom for about 30 seconds until fragrant. Pour in the heavy cream, then add the remaining seasonings and bring the sauce to a gentle simmer. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked pasta along with the reserved pasta water, tossing until the noodles are evenly coated in the sauce. Serve the crispy chicken over the creamy Parmesan pasta and finish with extra Parmesan on top. Enjoy 🤎 #chickenrecipe #pastarecipe #friedrice #dinnerideas

d: How to make the MOST FAMOUS bowl of ramen in the world 🍥 Comment some of your favorite fights in Naruto and follow for more! Pork broth - 6 pork legs - 6 pork knuckles Par boil for 10 minutes then rinse clean - 6 green onion - 1 white onion - 1 cup sliced ginger  - 1 half Fuji apple - water will vary depending on your pot I think mine was 7 or 8 liters Parboil you bones then rinse clean. Clean you pot really well then Fill with fresh water. Add the bones back in and boil 8-10 hours checking the water and skimming an impurities that float to the top. Once it’s a beautiful thick white stock, add in your aromatics and maybe a little water and boil for another 2 hours. Strain Tare recipe - 1/4 cup mirin  - 1/4 cup sake - 1.5 tbsp red miso - 1.5 tbsp black sesame miso (whatever you have is fine) - 1tbsp hondashi - 1 tbsp sesame seeds Cook down the mirin and sake until alcohol is cooked out before adding the other ingredients and cook for 3-5 minutes. Blend Chashu recipe - 2lb pork belly  - 1 cup dark soy - 2/3 mirin - 1/2 cup soy sauce - water until pork is almost submerged  Wrap your pork belly as tight as possible. Tie with kitchen twine. Sear on both sides then add in your braising liquid. Once it simmers cover and let cook 2-3 hours flipping halfway through. Let cool in the braising liquid then add to a ziplock bag and refrigerate overnight. Slice into disks and torch  Eggs - 3 large eggs - use the chashu braising liquid as the marinade (trust) Boil eggs for like 6:20 then immediately put in ice water. Combine your marinade and let them marinate for 12 hours or so Option aroma oil -slice ginger, garlic, and scallions. Pour 350F oil over them and let cool I soaked the bamboo shoots in the chashu braising liquid for about an hour but that’s optional #narutoramen #ramenlover #tonkotsu #animefood #fyp

d: Crispy Garlic Parmesan Chicken Wraps🍗🧀🌯 The flavours are absolutely phenomenal, one of the best wraps made using a sheet pan. Low effort, minimal cleanup and incredibly delicious🔥 Great to serve for large groups/gatherings at home Macros Per Wrap (10 Total) 423 Calories | 41g Protein | 25g Carbs | 18g Fat Ingredients (Makes 10 Wraps) Garlic Parmesan Chicken - 600g Raw Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs, cut into cubes - 600g Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes - 2.5 Tsp Salt - 2 Tsp Chilli Flakes - 3 Tsp Parsley - 4 Tsp Italian Herbs - 3 Tsp Paprika - 4 Tsp Garlic Granules or Powder - 200g Grated Parmesan - 6 Tsp Olive Oil - Avocado Cooking Spray (use before baking) Garlic Pamesan Creamy Sauce - 350g Light Evaporated Milk - 2 Tsp Italian Herbs - 1 Tsp Garlic Powder - 1 Tsp Paprika - 80g Grated Parmesan - 100g Light Cream Cheese - 15g Light Butter Wraps & Filling - 10 Low Carb Wraps (Brand: Mission) - Shredded Lettuce - Chopped Tomatoes - Chopped Onions 👨‍🍳 Cooking Instructions 1. Slice chicken breast and thighs into cubes. Add seasonings with grated parmesan cheese and drizzle of olive oil. Mix until well coated. 2. In a pan on low heat, add light butter with seasonings. Toast for a minute before adding evaporated milk, extra Parmesan and cream cheese. Stir till smooth and creamy. 3. Line a sheet pan with parchment paper, spread marinated chicken evenly (do not overcrowd), add light layer of cooking spray then bake in a preheated oven for 20-22 mins at 200C until crispy. 4. While chicken is still hot, add extra parmesan and parsley. Mix well until coated and extra cheesy. 5. Assemble the wraps with shredded lettuce, onion, tomato, crispy chicken and sauce. ENJOY! Storage and Reheating Tips - Store chicken and creamy sauce in separate containers in the fridge. - When ready to eat, just warm up chicken in oven/air fryer for 4-5 mins 180C / 370F. Warm up sauce in a pan, serve on a wrap with fresh lettuce and enjoy . . . . #garlicparmesan #chickenwrap #chickenrecipes #highprotein #healthyrecipes

🚨Stop scrolling because this is officially the WORLD’S BEST MAC AND CHEESE! 🧀🔥 If you want that elite, ultra-creamy, velvety cheese pull that will actually blow everyone's mind, you need to make this immediately. Absolutely no dry mac and cheese allowed here! 🤤✨ Bookmark and SAVE this video right now so you don’t lose the recipe! 📝 THE FULL RECIPE: Ingredients: 1 lb pasta (Cavatappi) 1 lb Mozzarella cheese, shredded 1 lb Colby Jack cheese, shredded 1/2 lb Sharp Cheddar cheese, shredded 3 tbsp unsalted butter 3 tbsp all-purpose flour 16 oz evaporated milk 2 cups heavy cream 1 tsp chicken bouillon 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp smoked paprika <1 tbsp Dijon mustard Instructions: Cook the Pasta: Boil your cavatappi pasta in salted water according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside. Shred the Cheese: Freshly grate your Mozzarella, Colby Jack, and Sharp Cheddar. Mix them all together in a large bowl, then divide the cheese mixture into two equal halves (one half for the sauce and layering, one half for the top). Make the Seasoning Mix: In a small bowl, combine the chicken bouillon, garlic powder, and smoked paprika. Build the Roux & Sauce: In a large pan over medium heat, melt 3 tbsp of unsalted butter. Stir in half of your seasoning mix to toast the spices. Gradually whisk in 3 tbsp of flour and cook for about 2 minutes. Slowly pour in the evaporated milk and heavy cream, whisking constantly until smooth. Season and Melt: Whisk in the remaining seasoning mix and less than a tablespoon of Dijon mustard. Turn off the heat so the mixture doesn't curdle, then add in the first half of your shredded cheese. Stir well until you have a beautiful, velvety cheese sauce. Combine: Pour the cooked pasta directly into the cheese sauce and fold until every single noodle is completely coated. Layer and Bake: In a baking dish, layer half of your cheesy mac and cheese. Sprinkle half of your remaining shredded cheese over it. Add the rest of the mac and cheese on top, and finish with a heavy layer of the remaining cheese. The Golden Crust: Bake in the oven at 375°F for 25–30 minutes until bubbling. Broil for the last 3–4 minutes to achieve that perfect, crispy, golden-brown cheese crust. Serve hot and enjoy the ultimate comfort food! 🛒 WANT THE TOOLS I USED? Everything you need to recreate this masterpiece—from the perfect baking dish to the ultimate cheese grater—is linked right here! Click the link below to upgrade your kitchen game now: 👉 https://beacons.ai/kitchenhome225 #macandcheese ese #macandcheeserecipe #macncheese eese #cheftini #tini

d: GIANT Buldak Cheese Omelette in Korea | Street Food 이거 그냥 오믈렛 아님, 불닭볶음면 한 봉지 통째로 접어버린 치즈 폭탄임🤯🔥 철판 위에 계란 거대하게 깔고 불닭+소시지+치즈 미친 양 때려 넣는데 비주얼부터 압살💥 모짜렐라+체다 치즈가 폭포처럼 녹아내리고 매운 냄새 올라오는 순간 사람들 다 멈춤👀 한입 먹으면 촉촉한 계란 + 핵매운 불닭 + 꾸덕한 치즈 조합 미쳐버림… 명동 가면 무조건 저장각🤤 📍 위치 : 서울 중구 명동길 일대 (명동 길거리) 🏡 매장명 : 명동 불닭 치즈 오믈렛 노점 ⏰ 운영시간 : 유동적 (방문 전 확인 권장) 🚃 가까운역 : 명동역 6번 출구 도보 약 3분 💵 가격 : ₩10,000 / 토핑 추가 ₩2,000 English Version 🇺🇸 This isn’t just an omelette, it’s a giant Buldak cheese explosion 🤯🔥 Huge egg sheet on the grill stuffed with spicy noodles, sausage, and crazy amounts of cheese Mozzarella + cheddar melt like a waterfall while the spicy aroma makes everyone stop👀 One bite = soft egg + insanely spicy Buldak + gooey cheese overload… viral Myeongdong street food for real🤤 📍 Location : Myeongdong Street, Jung-gu, Seoul 🏡 Store : Buldak Cheese Omelette Street Stall ⏰ Hours : Varies by day (Check before visiting) 🚃 Nearest Station : Myeongdong Station Exit 6, 3 min walk 💵 Price : ₩10,000 / Extra Topping ₩2,000 #KoreanStreetFood #MyeongdongStreetFood #Buldak #CheeseOmelette #KoreanFood SeoulFood SpicyNoodles ViralFood

d: 한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood
zh: 只要点一碗，老板就用大盆现拌的议政府拌面，20年老店

d: #foodtour #food #viral #streetfood #fyp

For 8 yuan ($1 USD) in China, I got a full kilogram of Jiang Xiang Bing  (酱香饼). The dough is flattened so wide that it folds onto itself while  baking, creating layers of texture. After five minutes in the oven, a  sweet fermented wheat sauce is brushed over the top. The folds soak up  the sauce, locking in extra flavor. Sesame seeds and scallions are  sprinkled as the finishing touch. The result is a fluffy, chewy bread  with a perfect balance of sweet and savory.   #China #Food #Travel #ChineseFood #ChinaFood #StreetFood
zh: 在中国花8元人民币买到整整一公斤酱香饼
